Class HelpMethods

java.lang.Object
utilz.HelpMethods
public class HelpMethods extends Object
The HelpMethods class contains various utility methods that help with game logic

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    CanMoveHere(float x, float y, float width, float height, int[][] lvlData)
    Determines if an entity can move to a specified position based on the level's data.
    static ArrayList<Coin>
    GetCoins(BufferedImage img)
     
    static ArrayList<GameContainer>
    GetContainers(BufferedImage img)
     
    static float
    GetEntPosWall(Rectangle2D.Float hitbox, float xSpeed)
    Calculates the x-coordinate at which an entity hits a wall while moving horizontally.
    static float
    GetEntYPosHitSmth(Rectangle2D.Float hitbox, float airSpeed)
    Calculates the y-coordinate at which an entity hits something while falling or jumping.
    static int[][]
    GetLevelData(BufferedImage img)
    Loads the level data from a level image.
    static ArrayList<Orc>
    GetOrcs(BufferedImage img)
    // Methods for extracting various game objects from a level image (Orcs, Potions, Containers, Traps, Coins)
    static ArrayList<Potion>
    GetPotions(BufferedImage img)
     
    static ArrayList<Trap>
    GetTraps(BufferedImage img)
     
    static boolean
    IsAllTilesWalkable(int xStart, int xEnd, int y, int[][] lvlData)
    Checks if all tiles in a specified range are walkable.
    static boolean
    IsEntOnFlour(Rectangle2D.Float hitbox, int[][] lvlData)
    Checks if an entity is standing on the floor.
    static boolean
    IsFloor(Rectangle2D.Float hitbox, float xSpeed, int[][] lvlData)
    Checks if there is a solid tile below the entity when moving horizontally.
    static boolean
    IsSightClear(int[][] lvlData, Rectangle2D.Float firstHitbox, Rectangle2D.Float secondHitbox, int yTile)
    Checks if the line of sight between two hitboxes is clear.
    static boolean
    IsSolid(float x, float y, int[][] lvlData)
    Checks if a specified position is solid (collision occurs) in the level's data.
    static boolean
    IsTileSolid(int xTile, int yTile, int[][] lvlData)
    Determines if a tile at the specified coordinates is solid.
